user.title: Configure Concierge Services
user.description: Enter the IMAP email credentials where you receive service bills (electricity, water, gas, etc.)

data_description.imap_port: Default port for secure IMAP connections
data_description.password: Use an app password for Gmail and Yahoo

finalize.title: Finalize Configuration
finalize.description: Set a friendly name for this email account ({email})

data_description.friendly_name: A descriptive name for this email account

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to IMAP server

abort.already_configured: This integration is already configured. Use the CONFIGURE button to update settings.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Concierge Services is allowed.

data_description.imap_port: Default port for secure IMAP connections
data_description.password: Use an app password for Gmail and Yahoo
data_description.friendly_name: A descriptive name for this email account

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to IMAP server

user.title: Add Service Device
user.description: Found {count} service account(s) available to add. Select which one to configure as a device:

discovery_confirm.title: Discovered: {service_name}
discovery_confirm.description: {service_name} was detected in the inbox ({email_count} email(s)). Do you want to add it as a service device?

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure {service_name}
reconfigure.description: Update the settings for this service device

error.service_not_found: Selected service not found. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This service account is already configured.
abort.detection_failed: Failed to scan the inbox for services. Check your email credentials.
abort.no_services_available: No new service accounts were found in the inbox. All detected services may already be configured.

force_refresh.name: Force Refresh
force_refresh.description: Forces an immediate email reading and PDF analysis for a single Concierge service device, bypassing the regular polling interval.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Concierge service device to refresh. Only devices from the Concierge HA Integration are shown.

set_value.name: Set Value (Learning Override)
set_value.description: Forces a specific value for a named attribute of a Concierge service entity and persists it as a learning override. The value is applied immediately and after every future email/PDF analysis.

attribute.name: Attribute
attribute.description: The internal attribute key to override (e.g. 'fixed_charge', 'gastos_comunes_amount'). When omitted the key is inferred automatically from the selected entity.

value.name: Value
value.description: The correct numeric value for the attribute (e.g. 9638).
